message:
fix(sync): make OnceCell::set non-blocking to prevent async deadlocks

OnceCell::set previously called wait_for_init_blocking() when another
thread was mid-initialization, which could deadlock in async contexts
where the initializer is a future on the same runtime. The INITIALIZING
state is now treated identically to INITIALIZED — both return Err(value)
immediately without blocking.

This is the correct semantic for a try-set operation: if someone else
is already initializing, the caller loses the race and gets its value
back. The doc comment is updated to reflect the new non-blocking
guarantee.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
